zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis於大約1545年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，他的父親Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany40歲，母親Janette McDowell36歲。他於1574年5月18日與Lady Elizabeth McGill在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1602年5月11日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾爾索恩享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis于大约1545年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，他的父亲Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany40岁，母亲Janette McDowell36岁。他于1574年5月18日与Lady Elizabeth McGill在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1602年5月11日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾爾索恩享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis was born about 1545, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany, was 40 and his mother, Janette McDowell, was 36. He married Lady Elizabeth McGill on 18 May 1574, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 May 1602, in Culzean, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis est né environ 1545, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Janette McDowell, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth McGill le 18 mai 1574, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1602, à Culzean, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis um 1545 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany 40 und seine Mutter Janette McDowell 36. Er hat am 18. Mai 1574 in Scotland Lady Elizabeth McGill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Mai 1602 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Culzean, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis è nato il circa 1545 nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Janette McDowell, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth McGill il 18 maggio 1574, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1602, nel Culzean, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillisが約1545年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父Thomas Kennedy 5th of Barganyは40歳，母Janette McDowellは36歳であった。1574年5月18日にスコットランドでLady Elizabeth McGillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1602年5月11日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクウルズエアンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis(이)가 대략 1545년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Janette McDowell(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1574년 5월 18일 스컷랜드에서 Lady Elizabeth McGill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1602년 5월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 컬즈이에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis nasceu aproximadamente 1545, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Janette McDowell, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth McGill em 18 de maio de 1574, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1602, em Culzean, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis родился около 1545 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Janette McDowell, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth McGill 18 мая 1574 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 мая 1602 г. в местности кулзин, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis nació aproximadamente 1545, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Janette McDowell, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth McGill el 18 de mayo de 1574, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1602, en Culzean, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
